meaning: n.X光的光量单位adj.X光的,有关X光的
examples: The Rontgen made a careful research to this phenomenon.
From near and far reporters streamed to interview Rontgen.
Rontgen went on to try to find out more about these strange invisible rays.
Element 111 is now Roentgenium (Rg), which is named for Wilhelm Rontgen, the German physicist who discovered X-Rays.
